content:
<!-- type: requirements lang: mermaid -->

```mermaid
---
id: requirements
---
requirementDiagram

requirement R1 {
  id: R1
  text: "Changes pseudocode in issue-centric-workflow.md must explicitly state change_dir is relative to project_root (main repo), not worktree_path"
  risk: low
  verifymethod: inspection
}

requirement R2 {
  id: R2
  text: "A Storage Model section must be added to issue-centric-workflow.md documenting control plane (main repo) vs data plane (worktree) split"
  risk: low
  verifymethod: inspection
}

requirement R3 {
  id: R3
  text: "The spec must document that init_change's execution order (change_dir before worktree creation) is correct by design"
  risk: low
  verifymethod: inspection
}
```
